text: Contains the thesis title, author details, degree requirements, and institutional affiliations including supervisors from DIAT and Manastu Space Technology.
title: Title Page

text: A dedication page with a quote from Lord Parashuram and acknowledgment of family and Manastu Space.
title: Dedication

text: Official approval sheet signed by examiners, supervisor, HOD, and chairman for the award of the M.Sc. degree.
title: Approval Sheet

text: Certifies completion of 16 courses (48 credits) including dissertation work for the M.Sc. in Materials Science.
title: Certificate of Coursework

text: Author's declaration certifying originality, non-submission elsewhere, and no classified information in the thesis.
title: Declaration

text: Supervisor's certificate confirming the thesis work was conducted under guidance and meets academic standards.
title: Certificate by Guide

text: Certificates from Manastu Space Technology mentors (Henry Sam and Aditya Hon) attesting to the thesis work's originality and industrial relevance.
title: Certificate by Industry Mentors

text: Overview of Manastu Space Technologies, their mission, innovations in green propulsion, and proprietary MS-289 propellant.
title: About the Company

text: Extensive acknowledgments to academic and industry mentors, family, friends, and colleagues for their support during the thesis work.
title: Acknowledgements

text: Introduces the thesis focus on high-temperature catalyst engineering for monopropellant thrusters, highlighting lanthanum chromite (LaCrO3) as the chosen catalyst material.
title: Abstract
